source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Compact analytical English UI with Japanese typography guidance for spiral analysis, metrics, tables, command search, and precise dashboard status messaging.
layout: Dense mathematical dashboards, compact navigation, 8px radii, fractal spiral chart marks, Romanesco cone texture, cream pith surfaces, and olive-green analytical contrast.

prompts.label: Transparent Romanesco motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source for public/systems/morphous-romanesco/motif.png
Primary request: Create only a single Romanesco broccoli head, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: one complete Romanesco cauliflower/broccoli head with accurate logarithmic spiral cones, self-similar fractal florets, chartreuse green tips, deeper olive-green shadowed bases, creamy pale-green highlights, crisp vegetable surface texture, compact vegetable-garden freshness.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical vegetable cutout, realistic painted-photographic finish, crisp opaque edges, natural studio light that preserves the spiral geometry.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; do not crop any spiral cone; no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: clean mathematical dashboard-system mood, precise and fresh, no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: chartreuse fractal green, cream highlights, olive-green shadows only; do not use magenta anywhere in the subject.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: keep subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges; no text, no watermark, no props, no garden bed, no leaves extending behind the head, no second vegetable, no decorative background, no extra saturated colors.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution light-mode design-system board for the Morphous catalog
Input images: use the visible transparent Romanesco motif as the source reference for colors, texture, geometry, spacing rhythm, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-style design-system board titled "Morphous Romanesco".
Canvas: exact 3840 x 2160 wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections with clear headings: Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
System mood: mathematical dashboard system for analytical workflows, model metrics, sequence health, cohort comparison, and fractal data exploration; precise, fresh, operational, dense but readable; 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the Romanesco motif: chartreuse fractal green, pale cream-green highlights, deeper olive-green shadows, vegetable-garden cream surfaces, soft stalk neutrals, dark seed/soil-green ink. No generic blue, no purple, no orange, no unrelated saturated colors.
Layout: polished product design board with a precise grid; left rail for motif preview, palette swatches, and token chips; central area for components, forms, type, Japanese typography, command/search, status states; right area for navigation, dashboard/data charts, tables, and metric cards; bottom strip for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small Romanesco motif cutout preview.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance with examples such as "ロマネスコ", "螺旋分析", "指標", "データ"; use large readable labels and keep text inside containers.
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command palette/search, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, metric cards, fractal spiral chart, cohort bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle Fibonacci cone texture, spiral-dot dividers, cream vegetable pith paper, fine garden-matte grain, crisp 8px card rhythm, restrained shadows.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board, not a marketing hero; labels must be large and readable; no abstract gradients, no unrelated colors, no random brand names, no watermark.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous catalog
Input images: use the visible Romanesco motif and the visible Morphous Romanesco light design-system board as source references.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode translation titled "Morphous Romanesco" with the same mathematical dashboard-system coverage and layout logic as the light board.
Canvas: exact 3840 x 2160 wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections with clear headings: Dark Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
System mood: mathematical dashboard system for analytical workflows, model metrics, sequence health, cohort comparison, and fractal data exploration; night-mode analysis console, precise, fresh, operational, dense but readable; 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the Romanesco motif: deep olive-green and seed-green backgrounds, fresh chartreuse primary controls, pale cream-green text highlights, subdued vegetable-garden cream lines, darker stalk-neutral panels. No generic blue, no purple, no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no pure flat black.
Layout: polished dark product design board with a precise grid; left rail for motif preview, palette swatches, and token chips; central area for components, forms, type, Japanese typography, command/search, status states; right area for navigation, dashboard/data charts, tables, and metric cards; bottom strip for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small Romanesco motif cutout preview.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance with examples such as "ロマネスコ", "螺旋分析", "指標", "データ"; use large readable labels and keep text inside containers.
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command palette/search, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, metric cards, fractal spiral chart, cohort bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle dark Fibonacci cone texture, spiral-dot dividers, cream-on-olive vegetable pith panels, fine garden-matte grain, crisp 8px card rhythm, restrained dark shadows.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board, not a marketing hero; labels must be large and readable; no abstract gradients, no unrelated colors, no random brand names, no watermark.
